title: RCE via Merge node SQL query mode (unrestricted alasql execution)
description: The Merge node's "Combine by SQL" mode runs the user-supplied query string directly through the alasql in-memory SQL engine via db.exec(query). alasql exposes file-system and code-loading primitives (FILE/SAVE/LOAD, the REQUIRE statement, and embedded JavaScript) that are reachable from SQL text. In the vulnerable version the only mitigation was disableAlasqlFileAccess(), which blocked some file FROM/fn handlers but not the REQUIRE statement or JavaScript execution path, so an authenticated user able to edit workflows could craft a query that writes arbitrary files and executes arbitrary code on the n8n server.
